description: Currently pursuing my passion for Full Stack Development and AI/ML. I have interned at ECOM Wizz working on web operations and SEO optimization. As a volunteer with Islami Jamiat Talba, I actively contribute to community development programs, organizing workshops on leadership and technical skills. My projects showcase hands-on experience in MERN stack and AI integration.

experiences.title: Web Development & SEO Intern
experiences.description: Developed and managed website operations while implementing SEO best practices to optimize online presence. Worked on website performance optimization and search engine visibility improvements.

experiences.title: MERN Full Stack Developer
experiences.description: Building production-grade MERN applications including Blood Trace (map-based donor locator), HireX (AI recruitment platform), and Shopping Mall Management System. Each project demonstrates full-stack capabilities with REST APIs, real-time features, and modern UI.

experiences.title: AI & ML Engineer
experiences.description: Developing AI models including NLP clinical inheritance patterns with BioBERT, Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer classification, and Location Intelligence ADK Agents. Implementing transfer learning, fine-tuning, and deploying models for real-world applications.

experiences.title: Community Development Volunteer
experiences.description: Organizing community outreach programs engaging local youth. Facilitating workshops on leadership development, personal growth, and technical skill building.

subtitle: Work, Internship and Volunteership
title: Experience
